summary: The audit for https://moveroo.com.au/terms-and-conditions-transport scored 98/100. Below is the list of issues requiring attention.

issues.remediation: Add author bylines with links to author bio pages. Use schema.org/Person markup for best results.
Audit your third-party scripts. Remove unused ones and defer others.
If this page represents a product or local business, add `aggregateRating` schema to be eligible for star snippets.
Try parsing your content into Q&A format using H2 and H3 tags.
